summary: Iteration 54: Team & Settings Refactor - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Bug fix: wrong PIN on 'Change My PIN' returns 400 (not 401), user stays logged in with error toast. Team page replaces Accounts + Permissions in sidebar. Settings page has My Account (all roles) + Security (admin only) tabs.

BUG_FIX_PIN_LOGOUT.PUT /api/auth/change-my-pin wrong PIN: PASS - Returns 400 'Current PIN is incorrect', NOT 401
BUG_FIX_PIN_LOGOUT.Frontend: Wrong PIN shows error toast: PASS - Toast shows 'Current PIN is incorrect', user stays on page
BUG_FIX_PIN_LOGOUT.User NOT logged out: PASS - Axios interceptor doesn't trigger logout on 400

TEAM_PAGE.Members tab: PASS - Shows user table with stats, search, 'Show disabled' toggle
TEAM_PAGE.Permissions tab: PASS - Shows user list + permission editor + presets
TEAM_PAGE.User stats row: PASS - Shows counts for Administrators, Managers, Cashiers, Inventory Clerks
TEAM_PAGE.Action buttons: PASS - Edit, Set PIN, Reset Password, Disable/Reactivate, Delete per user

SETTINGS_PAGE.My Account tab: PASS - Profile (name/email), Change Password, My PIN sections
SETTINGS_PAGE.Security tab (admin only): PASS - Admin PIN, TOTP setup, TOTP controls, Auditor Access
SETTINGS_PAGE.Profile form: PASS - Full Name + Email inputs with Save Profile button
SETTINGS_PAGE.My PIN form: PASS - Current PIN + New PIN + Confirm PIN fields

API_ENDPOINTS.GET /api/users?include_inactive=true: PASS - Returns all users including disabled
API_ENDPOINTS.PUT /api/users/{id}/pin: PASS - Admin sets any user's PIN

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix in auth.py line 235: Changed HTTPException from 401 to 400 for wrong PIN - correct fix
TeamPage.js: Well-structured with tabs, stats row, user table with all required actions
SettingsPage.js: Clean separation of My Account (all roles) and Security (admin only) tabs
Layout.js: NAV_SECTIONS correctly updated - Team and Settings in Management section, no Accounts/Permissions
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test user during API testing (cleanup successful)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the Team & Settings refactor are working: 1) PIN bug fixed - wrong PIN returns 400 not 401, user stays logged in. 2) Team page at /team merges old Accounts + Permissions pages with Members tab (user CRUD) and Permissions tab (granular permissions editor). 3) Settings page at /settings has My Account tab (profile, password, PIN for managers/admins) and Security tab (admin only - Admin PIN, TOTP, Auditor Access). 4) Sidebar updated - Team and Settings in Management section, old Accounts and Permissions nav items removed.
